examples: VAUDE leads the way by ingeniously combining the use of different seamless processing technologies to create a pack that is entirely welded.
VAUDE is the first manufacturer to apply ultrasonic technology in its backpack production and so sets new standards in the manufacturing of mountain sports equipment.
The mountain sports outfitter VAUDE receives for its innovative product design, the "2006 if product design award", one of the most distinguished design awards worldwide.
